_note: JSON cannot author Firewall or IIS configuration -- a JSON 'extensions' block is a hard build error (JSN019). This is a plain file-only installer. For IIS app pool + web site + firewall rules, use the C# fluent API: see demo/ 07 (Extensions Showcase, all four extensions in one project) or demos 29 (Firewall) and 30 (IIS).

downgrade.message: A newer version is already installed.
